scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.demo: cp backend/.env.demo backend/.env && cp frontend/.env.demo frontend/.env.local && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w frontend && npm run type-check -w backend
